stages.name: data_pipeline
stages.description: Reader tilizes RM input, compute tilizes then untilizes (identity), writer writes RM output
stages.extra_setup:
gamma = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1], dtype=torch.bfloat16)
    beta = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1], dtype=torch.bfloat16)
stages.extra_ttnn_setup:
gamma = ttnn.from_torch(gamma, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
    beta = ttnn.from_torch(beta, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

stages.name: subtract_mean
stages.description: Compute phases 1-2: reduce mean across W and subtract from input
stages.extra_setup:
gamma = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1], dtype=torch.bfloat16)
    beta = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1], dtype=torch.bfloat16)
stages.extra_ttnn_setup:
gamma = ttnn.from_torch(gamma, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
    beta = ttnn.from_torch(beta, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

stages.name: full_layer_norm
stages.description: All compute phases: mean, subtract, square, variance+rsqrt, scale, gamma, beta
stages.extra_setup:
gamma = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1], dtype=torch.bfloat16)
    beta = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, shape[-1], dtype=torch.bfloat16)
stages.extra_ttnn_setup:
gamma = ttnn.from_torch(gamma, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
    beta = ttnn.from_torch(beta, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)
